stories.headline: Fed holds at 3.75% with 4 dissents — most since 1992 — as Powell exits May 15
stories.tldr: The FOMC kept the policy band at 3.75% but four officials dissented, the widest split since 1992, capping Powell's final presser before his May 15 term end.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A fractured committee plus a chair handover injects policy-path uncertainty just as crypto risk leans into a quiet-tape rate hold.
the_details: Hold matched ~95% market-implied odds, but four dissents was the highest count at any FOMC since 1992.
Powell confirmed May 15, 2026 as his final day as chair; succession watch now drives front-end pricing.
BTC drifted 0.37% lower to $76,177 post-decision; ETH slipped 0.95% to $2,267 as rate-cut optimism cooled.

stories.headline: SEC-CFTC joint guidance brands BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LINK as digital commodities
stories.tldr: A joint SEC-CFTC interpretation released a token taxonomy classifying the five largest non-stable assets as digital commodities, ending years of jurisdictional limbo.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A formal commodities tag for ETH, SOL, XRP and LINK clears the path for spot ETFs, futures listings and bank custody under CFTC primacy.
the_details: Taxonomy splits crypto into digital commodities, collectibles, tools, stablecoins and digital securities.
SEC Chair Paul Atkins called the parallel MOU 'a roadmap for a new era of harmonization' between agencies.
Pairs with FDIC's GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking and the IRS Form 1099-DA cost-basis regime live since April 15.

stories.headline: MEGA goes live: MegaETH TGE prints with Coinbase pre-listing already wired
stories.tldr: MegaETH's MEGA token launched today after all 10 Mega Mafia apps cleared the 100k-tx KPI gate, with Coinbase pre-listing already in place.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A KPI-gated TGE plus tier-one CEX day-one liquidity is the new template fast-L2 launches will be judged against.
the_details: Polymarket April 30 contract pinned at 97.4% YES into the print, $349,577 USDC daily volume on the date market alone.
TGE was triggered April 23 once 10 incubated apps each crossed 100,000 verified mainnet transactions over 30 days.
Coinbase pre-listing live; total MegaETH-related markets cleared $462,687 in 24h USDC volume pre-launch.

stories.headline: Meta turns Colombia and Philippines creators on to USDC payouts via Solana, Polygon
stories.tldr: Meta enabled USDC creator payouts in Colombia and the Philippines on Solana and Polygon rails, marking its first serious blockchain push since Diem's collapse.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A 3B-user platform routing real creator income through Solana and Polygon is the cleanest stablecoin distribution unlock since PayPal's PYUSD.
the_details: USDC payouts route via Solana and Polygon, both selected for sub-cent fees and stablecoin throughput.
Colombia and Philippines first — both top-10 remittance corridors with high stablecoin penetration.
First Meta on-chain product since Diem's 2022 wind-down, signaling renewed institutional comfort post-GENIUS Act.

stories.headline: Coinbase opens WRON-USD spot trading on May 1 as Ronin liquidity ramps
stories.tldr: Coinbase will enable WRON-USD spot trading from May 1, giving Ronin's gaming token its first US tier-one fiat pair after years of offshore-only liquidity.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A US tier-one fiat pair for a gaming-chain native asset tests whether SEC-CFTC's new commodities tag actually accelerates listings.
the_details: WRON-USD goes live on Coinbase May 1, 2026 — first tier-one US fiat pair for the Ronin native asset.
Listing follows the SEC-CFTC joint guidance treating non-stable, non-security tokens as digital commodities.
Lands into a soft tape: total crypto market cap at $2.63T, volume $107.3B, both down on the day.
